title: 10 best herbal teas for acute bronchitis
description: Elder teas helps with acute bronchitis because of its potent antimicrobial properties, which combat infection-causing bacteria and viruses. The tea's expectorant qualities help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, making it easier to expel phlegm and reduce congestion. Additionally, elder tea's anti-inflammatory properties soothe irritated airways, reducing coughing fits and discomfort.
